title: Passport Application
description: Apply for a new passport or renew your existing one online.
overview: The passport application process allows citizens to obtain travel documents for international travel.
howToApply: 1. Visit the official portal. 2. Fill out the application form. 3. Pay the fee. 4. Schedule an appointment.

title: Driver's License Renewal
description: Renew your driver's license before it expires to avoid penalties.
overview: Keep your driving privileges active by renewing your license every 5-10 years depending on your state.
howToApply: 1. Log in to the DMV portal. 2. Verify your details. 3. Pay the renewal fee. 4. Download your temporary license.

title: Social Security Benefits
description: Apply for retirement, disability, or survivor benefits.
overview: Social Security provides financial support to retired workers and those with disabilities.
howToApply: 1. Create a 'my Social Security' account. 2. Complete the online application. 3. Submit required evidence.

title: Business Registration
description: Register your new business entity with the state and federal government.
overview: Legally establish your business to start operations and hire employees.
howToApply: 1. Choose a business name. 2. Register with the Secretary of State. 3. Apply for an EIN.

title: Voter Registration
description: Register to vote in upcoming local, state, and federal elections.
overview: Exercise your right to vote by ensuring you are registered in your current jurisdiction.
howToApply: 1. Check eligibility. 2. Fill out the registration form. 3. Submit via mail or online.

title: Small Business Grants
description: Explore available grants for small businesses and startups.
overview: Government grants provide non-repayable funds to support economic growth and innovation.
howToApply: 1. Search for eligible grants. 2. Prepare a business proposal. 3. Submit application via Grants.gov.

title: Unemployment Insurance
description: File a claim for unemployment benefits if you have lost your job.
overview: Temporary financial assistance for workers who are unemployed through no fault of their own.
howToApply: 1. File a claim with your state agency. 2. Provide employment history. 3. Certify weekly eligibility.

title: Student Loan Forgiveness
description: Apply for public service loan forgiveness or other relief programs.
overview: Programs designed to reduce or eliminate student debt for eligible borrowers.
howToApply: 1. Verify loan eligibility. 2. Complete the PSLF form. 3. Submit to the Department of Education.

title: Birth Certificate Request
description: Order a certified copy of a birth certificate for legal purposes.
overview: Vital records are essential for identity verification and legal documentation.
howToApply: 1. Identify the issuing office. 2. Complete the request form. 3. Pay the processing fee.

title: Tax Filing (Individual)
description: File your annual federal and state income tax returns.
overview: Ensure compliance with tax laws by filing your returns by the annual deadline.
howToApply: 1. Gather income documents. 2. Choose a filing method (e-file or paper). 3. Submit to the IRS.
